mapper.insert: insert into user_notification (user_id, biz_type, biz_id, title, content, is_read, create_time) values (#{userId}, #{bizType}, #{bizId}, #{title}, #{content}, '0', sysdate())
mapper.select: select id, user_id, biz_type, biz_id, title, content, is_read, create_time from user_notification where user_id = #{userId} order by create_time desc
select count(1) from user_notification where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.update: update user_notification set is_read = '1' where id = #{id} and user_id = #{userId}
update user_notification set is_read = '1' where user_id = #{userId} and is_read = '0'
mapper.delete:
delete from user_notification where id in
#{id}
